name: 勇者有点太嚣张。™G(No Hero Allowed: No Puzzle Either!)
short_description: Porting game from PSVita platform.In the game, you will play the lord who takes up the pickel and makes the army of demons to defeat the hero who come to attack the maze,It is recommended to open the sound experience game will be very feeling, the normal world is about 8-10 hours, collecting all the monsters and braver have certain...
detailed_description: The legend is to be unearthed! Full of familiar bridges of RPG , the unique game「hero is too arrogant 」series, which is now full of hunting block, and is fully resurrected on the PC. The player must destroy the block with his pickel, so that he can summon the monster to fight back「hero」, who go closer to the puzzle. In addition, you can「catch」 the hero, 「dig」new monster and magic objects, and 「evolution」 the monster Legion, with your original powerful Legion to deal with those who are too arrogant!
about_the_game: The legend is to be unearthed! Full of familiar bridges of RPG , the unique game「hero is too arrogant 」series, which is now full of hunting block, and is fully resurrected on the PC.
